title: Chart change default displaytype to table
excerpt:
Hi All, 
In a chart, when i click on a bar, a new screen opens as default in displaytype “split mode”. 
Is it possible to change the default? if so, is it possible to define this per chart?

posts.author: mnigten (Michael Nigten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

In a chart, when i click on a bar, a new screen opens as default in displaytype “split mode”.
Is it possible to change the default? if so, is it possible to define this per chart?

i would like to open as default the table behind.
